overview: Vesak Festival community dashboard — a mobile-first web app for Sri Lankan Vesak festival celebrations. Features Dansal registration with province/district filtering, lantern photo gallery with comments, social sharing, admin panel, approval workflows, and proximity notifications.
features: Dansal registration and management with province, district, food category, and time filters
Lantern photo gallery with upload, likes, emoji reactions, and text comments
Social share buttons for Dansals (WhatsApp, Facebook, copy link)
Admin panel (PIN-protected) with approval workflow, reports, and user management
Organizer analytics, favourites list, and public organizer profiles
Vesak Poya countdown timer and category-based event map
Sinhala language throughout with mobile-safe keyboard handling
